step1_title: To link your OurStage account, please go to this channel:
step1_warning:
YOU MUST BE IN THE RIGHT CHANNEL!
Running commands in wrong channel WILL NOT WORK!
step2_title: Type <cmd>/link</cmd> and select the first option
step2_warning_not_real: This is not a real ID!
step3_title: When this message appears, you have succeeded.
step3_desc: You can go back to the game and play now!
success_footer: Only you can see this message
id_help_title: Don't know what your ID is?
id_help_desc: Find your ID on the title screen of OurStage. It is located at the <loc>{{location}}</loc> of your screen.
id_dash_desc: Click on the game to let it load for a while, and it will generate an ID for you. But since you need to link an account, the game will return a <cmd>Not allowed</cmd> popup, which is normal, just click <cmd>OK</cmd> to return to the title screen.
closing_text: It's super quick! Once done, you're ready to play!
cm_subtitle: Here are 7 ways linking your account could fail. Don't let this be you!
cm_1_desc: Those shiny suggestions popped up for a reason, you know? Please actually click them next time, because if you just type it out, the bot is effectively 'blind' to you.
cm_2_desc: It's just a few numbers, yet somehow they got scrambled or lost. Did the OCR mix up 1 with I, 0 with O, or 7 with /? Double-check it carefully, we don't want the bot to start pouting from all these mistakes!
cm_3_desc: Dozens of channels and you chose #general or #os-chat instead of #os-support? The bot is 'blind' there, please move to the correct channel!
cm_4_desc: Peak laziness: Watching someone else fail and then doing the exact same thing instead of reading the guide. Please, just read the instructions once. Just once!
cm_5_desc: The bot only has eyes for ONE solid string of STANDARD LATIN NUMBERS. No spaces, no 'extra' text (like <cmd>UserID:</cmd>), no 'Fat' (full-width) numbers, and definitely NO tiny superscript fonts (⁰¹²³). It's not as smart as you think, so keep it simple!
cm_6_desc: Player ID IS JUST NUMBERS! It's not your game version '6.4.0.Luna', not your UUID '1a48...', not a 'JASRAC/ID0000x' license, and definitely not your In-Game Name! Look closely at the screen!
cm_7_title: 7. Using an Official Project SEKAI ID
cm_7_desc: Repeating this for the N-th time: This is OurStage, NOT the official Project SEKAI! Don't just paste your Japanese server ID here. The bot doesn't have access to SEGA's database.
